original_image_tags: Red rectangular ink stamp on left margin containing text: "MAILED 3, Sealed, JUN 1 5 1977, FBI".
Red rectangular ink stamp on right margin: "JUN 17 1977"
Vertical list of FBI office abbreviations on the left margin, including:
Footer section with "APPROVED:" and multiple blank lines for initials next to department titles such as "Director", "Assoc. Dir.", etc. Bottom right text reads "FBI/DOJ".

elements.description: A rectangular red ink stamp in the lower left corner containing the text 'MAILED 3', 'Sealed', 'JUN 15 1977', and 'FBI'.
A small circular red ink stamp on the right side containing the date 'JUN 17 1977'.
A circular ink stamp at the bottom left containing the date '56 JUL 18 1977' and the text 'MAIL ROOM'.

judge.reason: The descriptions contradict on the verbatim text and shape of the right-side stamp ('JUN 17 1977' vs '56 JUL 18 1977' and 'MAIL ROOM'), and one side invents a third stamp.
